artPrompt: A subterranean archive descends into the wide frame: a narrow iron stair plunges past flickering municipal bulbs into a flooded basement of warped filing cabinets, an out-of-order elevator cage rusting in the dark. A single guttering light reveals papers stirring on their own in the murk. Faint arcane glow rises from the depths below, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Records Basement
text:
The Records Basement enters the battlefield tapped. (The elevator is, and always has been, out of order.)
{T}: Add {U}.
{2}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice The Records Basement: Draw two cards. You finally found the file. It was right where the system said it wasn't.
flavorText: Sub-sub-basement 3. Past the boiler. Mind the things that file themselves down there.
